NKJV.1: Praise the LORD! I will praise the LORD with my whole heart, In the assembly of the upright and in the congregation.
NKJV.2: The works of the LORD are great, Studied by all who have pleasure in them.
NKJV.3: His work is honorable and glorious, And His righteousness endures forever.
NKJV.4: He has made His wonderful works to be remembered; The LORD is gracious and full of compassion.
NKJV.5: He has given food to those who fear Him; He will ever be mindful of His covenant.
NKJV.6: He has declared to His people the power of His works, In giving them the heritage of the nations.
NKJV.7: The works of His hands are verity and justice; All His precepts are sure.
NKJV.8: They stand fast forever and ever, And are done in truth and uprightness.
NKJV.9: He has sent redemption to His people; He has commanded His covenant forever: Holy and awesome is His name.
NKJV.10: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; A good understanding have all those who do His commandments. His praise endures forever.

ESV.1: Praise the LORD! I will give thanks to the LORD with my whole heart, in the company of the upright, in the congregation.
ESV.2: Great are the works of the LORD, studied by all who delight in them.
ESV.3: Full of splendor and majesty is his work, and his righteousness endures forever.
ESV.4: He has caused his wondrous works to be remembered; the LORD is gracious and merciful.
ESV.5: He provides food for those who fear him; he remembers his covenant forever.
ESV.6: He has shown his people the power of his works, in giving them the inheritance of the nations.
ESV.7: The works of his hands are faithful and just; all his precepts are trustworthy;
ESV.8: they are established forever and ever, to be performed with faithfulness and uprightness.
ESV.9: He sent redemption to his people; he has commanded his covenant forever. Holy and awesome is his name!
ESV.10: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; all those who practice it have a good understanding. His praise endures forever!

NASB.1: Praise the LORD! I will give thanks to the LORD with all [my] heart, In the company of the upright and in the assembly.
NASB.2: Great are the works of the LORD; [They are] studied by all who delight in them.
NASB.3: Splendid and majestic is His work, And His righteousness endures forever.
NASB.4: He has made His wonders to be remembered; The LORD is gracious and compassionate.
NASB.5: He has given food to those who fear Him; He will remember His covenant forever.
NASB.6: He has made known to His people the power of His works, In giving them the heritage of the nations.
NASB.7: The works of His hands are truth and justice; All His precepts are sure.
NASB.8: They are upheld forever and ever; They are performed in truth and uprightness.
NASB.9: He has sent redemption to His people; He has ordained His covenant forever; Holy and awesome is His name.
NASB.10: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; A good understanding have all those who do [His commandments]; His praise endures forever.

NLT.1:
Praise the LORD!
I will thank the LORD with all my heart
as I meet with his godly people.
NLT.2:
How amazing are the deeds of the LORD!
All who delight in him should ponder them.
NLT.3:
Everything he does reveals his glory and majesty.
His righteousness never fails.
NLT.4:
He causes us to remember his wonderful works.
How gracious and merciful is our LORD!
NLT.5:
He gives food to those who fear him;
he always remembers his covenant.
NLT.6:
He has shown his great power to his people
by giving them the lands of other nations.
NLT.7:
All he does is just and good,
and all his commandments are trustworthy.
NLT.8:
They are forever true,
to be obeyed faithfully and with integrity.
NLT.9:
He has paid a full ransom for his people.
He has guaranteed his covenant with them forever.
What a holy, awe-inspiring name he has!
NLT.10:
Fear of the LORD is the foundation of true wisdom.
All who obey his commandments will grow in wisdom.
Praise him forever!

WEB.1: Praise Yah!  I will give thanks to Yahweh with my whole heart, in the council of the upright, and in the congregation.
WEB.2: Yahweh’s works are great, pondered by all those who delight in them.
WEB.3: His work is honor and majesty. His righteousness endures forever.
WEB.4: He has caused his wonderful works to be remembered. Yahweh is gracious and merciful.
WEB.5: He has given food to those who fear him. He always remembers his covenant.
WEB.6: He has shown his people the power of his works, in giving them the heritage of the nations.
WEB.7: The works of his hands are truth and justice. All his precepts are sure.
WEB.8: They are established forever and ever. They are done in truth and uprightness.
WEB.9: He has sent redemption to his people. He has ordained his covenant forever. His name is holy and awesome!
WEB.10: The fear of Yahweh is the beginning of wisdom. All those who do his work have a good understanding. His praise endures forever!

AMP.1:
Praise the LORD! (Hallelujah!)
I will give thanks to the LORD with all my heart,
In the company of the upright and in the congregation.
AMP.2:
Great are the works of the LORD,
Studied by all those who delight in them.
AMP.3:
Splendid and majestic is His work,
And His righteousness endures forever.
AMP.4:
He has made His wonderful acts to be remembered;
The LORD is gracious and merciful and full of loving compassion.
AMP.5:
He has given food to those who fear Him [with awe-inspired reverence];
He will remember His covenant forever.
AMP.6:
He has declared and made known to His people the power of His works,
In giving them the heritage of the nations.
AMP.7:
The works of His hands are truth and [absolute] justice;
All His precepts are sure (established, reliable, trustworthy).
AMP.8:
They are upheld forever and ever;
They are done in [absolute] truth and uprightness.
AMP.9:
He has sent redemption to His people;
He has ordained His covenant forever;
Holy and awesome is His name—[inspiring reverence and godly fear].
AMP.10:
The [reverent] fear of the LORD is the beginning (the prerequisite, the absolute essential, the alphabet) of wisdom;
A good understanding and a teachable heart are possessed by all those who do the will of the Lord;
His praise endures forever.

MSG.1:
Hallelujah!
I give thanks to God with everything I've got—
Wherever good people gather, and in the congregation.
MSG.2:
God's works are so great, worth
A lifetime of study—endless enjoyment!
MSG.3:
Splendor and beauty mark his craft;
His generosity never gives out.
MSG.4:
His miracles are his memorial—
This God of Grace, this God of Love.
MSG.5:
He gave food to those who fear him,
He remembered to keep his ancient promise.
MSG.6:
He proved to his people that he could do what he said:
Hand them the nations on a platter—a gift!
MSG.7:
He manufactures truth and justice;
All his products are guaranteed to last—
MSG.8:
Never out-of-date, never obsolete, rust-proof.
All that he makes and does is honest and true:
MSG.9:
He paid the ransom for his people,
He ordered his Covenant kept forever.
He's so personal and holy, worthy of our respect.
MSG.10:
The good life begins in the fear of God—
Do that and you'll know the blessing of God.
His Hallelujah lasts forever!

NIV.1:
Psalm 111
Praise the Lord.
I will extol the Lord with all my heart
in the council of the upright and in the assembly.
NIV.2:
Great are the works of the Lord;
they are pondered by all who delight in them.
NIV.3:
Glorious and majestic are his deeds,
and his righteousness endures forever.
NIV.4:
He has caused his wonders to be remembered;
the Lord is gracious and compassionate.
NIV.5:
He provides food for those who fear him;
he remembers his covenant forever.
NIV.6:
He has shown his people the power of his works,
giving them the lands of other nations.
NIV.7:
The works of his hands are faithful and just;
all his precepts are trustworthy.
NIV.8:
They are steadfast for ever and ever,
done in faithfulness and uprightness.
NIV.9:
He provided redemption for his people;
he ordained his covenant forever—
holy and awesome is his name.
NIV.10:
The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom;
all who follow his precepts have good understanding.
To him belongs eternal praise.

NRSVCE.1:
Praise the LORD!
I will give thanks to the LORD with my whole heart,
in the company of the upright, in the congregation.
NRSVCE.2:
Great are the works of the LORD,
studied by all who delight in them.
NRSVCE.3:
Full of honor and majesty is his work,
and his righteousness endures forever.
NRSVCE.4:
He has gained renown by his wonderful deeds;
the LORD is gracious and merciful.
NRSVCE.5:
He provides food for those who fear him;

NRSVCE.6:
He has shown his people the power of his works,

NRSVCE.7:

NRSVCE.9:

he has commanded his covenant forever.

NRSVCE.10:
The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom;
all those who practice it have a good understanding.
His praise endures forever.

NET.1: Praise the LORD! I will give thanks to the LORD with my whole heart, in the assembly of the godly and the congregation.
NET.2: The LORD’s deeds are great, eagerly awaited by all who desire them.
NET.3: His work is majestic and glorious, and his faithfulness endures forever.
NET.4: He does amazing things that will be remembered; the LORD is merciful and compassionate.
NET.5: He gives food to his faithful followers; he always remembers his covenant.
NET.6: He announced that he would do mighty deeds for his people, giving them a land that belonged to other nations.
NET.7: His acts are characterized by faithfulness and justice; all his precepts are reliable.
NET.8: They are forever firm, and should be faithfully and properly carried out.
NET.9: He delivered his people; he ordained that his covenant be observed forever. His name is holy and awesome.
NET.10: To obey the LORD is the fundamental principle for wise living; all who carry out his precepts acquire good moral insight. He will receive praise forever.
